LinkupAPI lets agents send messages, man: LinkupAPI lets agents send messages, manage conversations, and automate outreach across every channel, for sales and recruitment.
Your LinkupAPI key, sent as the `x-api-k: Your LinkupAPI key, sent as the `x-api-key` header. Get it from https://app.linkupapi.com
List all connected LinkedIn accounts lin: List all connected LinkedIn accounts linked to your API key. Free (0 credits). Use the returned account_id in other actions.
Get detailed information and status for: Get detailed information and status for a specific connected account. Free (0 credits).
Retrieve the profile of the connected Li: Retrieve the profile of the connected LinkedIn account.
Retrieve detailed information about a Li: Retrieve detailed information about a LinkedIn profile by URL, public identifier, or URN.
Search LinkedIn profiles by keyword, com: Search LinkedIn profiles by keyword, company, title, location, school, industry and more. Returns the LinkedIn URL of each match.
Search LinkedIn companies by keyword, lo: Search LinkedIn companies by keyword, location, sector and company size.
Retrieve detailed information about a Li: Retrieve detailed information about a LinkedIn company page.
Send a LinkedIn message to a profile, op: Send a LinkedIn message to a profile, optionally with a media attachment.
Retrieve the message history of a Linked: Retrieve the message history of a LinkedIn conversation, by conversation ID or profile URL.
Send a LinkedIn connection invitation to: Send a LinkedIn connection invitation to a profile, with an optional note.
Check the status of a connection invitat: Check the status of a connection invitation sent to a profile.
Make a custom API call to a specific end: Maak een aangepaste API call naar een specifiek eindpunt

Fires in real time when the connected Li: Fires in real time when the connected LinkedIn account receives a new message. Registers a LinkupAPI webhook (≈10 credits/day per monitored account while active).
Fires in real time when a connection req: Fires in real time when a connection request sent from the connected LinkedIn account is accepted. Registers a LinkupAPI webhook (≈10 credits/day per monitored account while active).
